question: Will the S&P 500 be above 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: Based on the search results, the S&P 500 closed at 6,782.81 on April 8, 2026, which is 142.18 points below the target of 6925.00. With only one trading day remaining until the resolution, the index would need to gain approximately 2.1% overnight to reach the target. While markets have shown recent volatility and the index has gained strongly in recent sessions (+2.51% on April 8), such a large single-day move to reach this precise level is unlikely. The market has been experiencing geopolitical uncertainties and is currently in a volatile environment following Iran ceasefire negotiations.
key_factors: Current S&P 500 level at 6,782.81 as of April 8 close, requiring 2.1% gain in one day
Recent market volatility with strong gains on ceasefire optimism
